title: Linux Updates
unsupported: Automatic updates are only supported for the Linux AppImage build.
notAvailable: You are on the latest version.
linuxOnly: Automatic updates are only supported for packaged Linux AppImage builds.
manualDownload: Downloads start only when you choose Download.

reason.not-linux: This build is not running on Linux.
reason.not-packaged: Updates are disabled in development builds.
reason.not-appimage: This Linux build is not running from an AppImage.
reason.disabled-by-settings: Linux updates are disabled in settings.

technical.hint: Check your internet connection or the GitHub Release state.
